# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: allow-ssh-from-anywhere
  type: GCEFirewallRule
  properties:
    network: default
    targetTags:
      - ssh-access
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - '22'
- name: allow-rdp-from-anywhere
  type: GCEFirewallRule
  properties:
    network: default
    targetTags:
      - rdp-access
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - '3389'
- name: allow-http-from-anywhere
  type: GCEFirewallRule
  properties:
    network: default
    targetTags:
      - http-access
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - '80'
- name: allow-https-from-anywhere
  type: GCEFirewallRule
  properties:
    network: default
    targetTags:
      - https-access
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - '443'
